text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day, and for some reason,
Vodka is running toward me with blood gushing
out of her nose!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Man, I'm dizzy... I'm comin' in, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hurriedly wipes off the blood. Everything
seems to be fine...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whew. That was rough...
choice_data_list: Did you get into a fight?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, right! Why would I do that on Valentine's
Day?
choice_data_list: Then did you eat too much chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I got a bunch, but I'm not gonna eat 'em. I
appreciate the thought, but I'll give 'em to
someone who wants them later.
choice_data_list: What happened to your nose, then?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh... I did it! I made some homemade
chocolate for Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see the look on their face. Maybe
Trainer'll be all like, "These are incredible!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And I'll go, "Gimme a break! They're not that good! Don't go soft on me now!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to thank me or nothin'... They're
just to pay you back for everything... you've done
for me... Urk!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Bwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A-actually, yeah, it was from a fight! It was your
everyday fight to the death!
choice_data_list: Vodka... You shouldn't be getting in fights.
Vodka... You shouldn't be getting in fights.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know. I won't do it again! And don't worry, the
other person's just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Quite the "fight to the death"... I don't really get
it, but I'm glad there aren't any serious injuries.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So, anyway, I made this chocolate for you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Give it a try. It came out a little rough and on the
dark side... Just like me, I guess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box to find a number of cute little dark
chocolates inside.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Th-this isn't really my thing. Guess you could say
I'm not that used to it...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hurry up and eat them already! You don't gotta
stare at it. Or me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I-is it a little hot in here, or is it just m—oh no!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Bwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A red stream bursts from her nose once more,
plunging my office into chaos.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates were delicious, but talk about a
bloody valentine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates were delicious, but talk about a
bloody valentine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
S-Sorry for makin' ya walk me home. Pretty lame,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I mean, getting all anemic and lightheaded from a
nosebleed? At least no one saw me, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Fan Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Vodka! Vodkaaa!

text_block_list.name: Fan Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I made you some chocolates, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm surrounded!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having found their target, a bunch of
Umamusume quickly surround Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I have to get her through this crowd
and safely back to the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What should I do, Trainer? Usually I'd have no
trouble shakin' 'em, but in this condition...
choice_data_list: Do you have any more chocolate?!
Do you have any more chocolate?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
More chocolate? I have a couple of pieces that
weren't nice enough to put in the box.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Throw them?! Oh, I get it! All right, here goes
nothin'...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's raining chocolate! Get some while you can!

text_block_list.name: Fan Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ahhh! Chocolate from Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Fan Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I want some! I want sooome! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's attention turns to the chocolate,
giving the two of us an opening.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: N-nice one, Trainer! There's a path ahead!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You really saved my bacon. Kinda reminds me
what I saw in you back when—

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: S-scratch that! Let's just hurry and get outta here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We break straight through the gap in the crowd! I
feel like I've been able to repay Vodka for the
chocolate, if only a little bit.
